name: Nutty Rice Loaf
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Spray a 9 x 5 inch loaf pan with non-stick vegetable spray.
Combine the ingredients and pack into the loaf pan.
Bake for 40-45 minutes or until brown on edges and firm to touch.
Cut into slices. Serve hot or at room temperature with a salad.
Optional:
Microwave in glass loaf pan covered with wax paper for 8 minutes on high power, rotating once.
If the mixture holds together well enough, shape into patties and brown in a non-stick frying pan.
